notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-theory-of-planned-: The label 'planned behavior' is too short and potentially ambiguous. 'Theory of planned behavior' is more specific and commonly used in marketing literature.
notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-probabilistic-logi: This topic seems more related to AI or computer science than consumer behavior in marketing. The sample titles do not strongly support its inclusion under this parent topic.
notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-organizational-jus: This topic is related to organizational behavior and management, not directly to consumer behavior within marketing. The sample titles are also more aligned with organizational studies.
